title: Dealer Requests Exclusivity on a Construction Project
openingLine: We brought you in early on this corporate HQ build-out. We did all the legwork on the design and convinced the client to spec your product. Since this is moving forward, we want to be guaranteed exclusivity on the project. Fair deal, right?
customerContext: You're a small dealer who genuinely did pour effort into pulling this in. You're feeling protective of your work and a little anxious that another dealer will swoop in and undercut you at the bid stage. You're asking for exclusivity because you've been burned before. You may not fully appreciate the dynamics of larger projects with multiple dealers.

hiddenInfo.reveal: We've been on this project for 5 months. Hosted the client at our showroom, did the initial design proposals, pushed for Wenger acoustic and storage.
Design is mostly done. Bid in 8 weeks. About 80% certain it goes to construction.
We've sold Wenger for 6 years. Mostly smaller projects — this is our largest by 3x.
Reliable on smaller projects. Untested on this scale. Strong client relationships.
$60M corporate HQ. Wenger scope is around $300K — acoustic treatment in board rooms and music room amenity space.
Bid 8 weeks out, construction starts 6 months after.
Client's facilities team and their architect. Both have been at every meeting.

Discovery & Qualification.behavior: Confirmed the dealer's level of involvement and influence
Asked whether the project is fully qualified — exclusivity carries risk
Asked if dealer can support the project end to end

Solution Framing.behavior: Considered any conflicts with existing dealer agreements

Opportunity Expansion.behavior: Asked about ongoing relationship vs. one-off exclusivity

BANT.behavior: Assessed dealer reputation and reliability for a project this size

Timeline Awareness.behavior: Set post-bid and post-install review meetings

Closing & Next Steps.behavior: Agreed on exclusivity criteria — one-off vs. ongoing

Other.behavior: Considered impact on relationships with other dealers
